title: Kavacha Theme Manifest
description: manifest.json at the root of a theme package. Package layout: manifest.json, colors.json, style.css, icons/, fonts/.

version.description: Semver; the marketplace uses this for updates.

kavachaMinVersion.description: Minimum Kavacha version this theme supports.

colors.description: Relative path to the color token file (fixed name).

style.description: Optional custom chrome CSS, relative path (typically 'style.css'). Loaded sandboxed into browser chrome, not into web content.

fonts.description: Bundled font files (woff2) referenced from style.css.
